mapper.select: SELECT id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", order_id as "orderId", subject as "subject", category as "category", priority as "priority", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", assigned_agent_id as "assignedAgentId", description as "description", resolved_at as "resolvedAt", reopen_count as "reopenCount", hours_open as "hoursOpen", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "ticketCount" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat GROUP BY state_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND hours_open > COALESCE(#{slaHours}, 24)

SELECT id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", subject as "subject", category as "category", priority as "priority", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", assigned_agent_id as "assignedAgentId", created_at as "createdAt", hours_open as "hoursOpen" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE state_id NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'RESOLVED') AND hours_open > COALESCE(#{slaHours}, 24) ORDER BY created_at ASC ${pagination}

SELECT id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", subject as "subject", category as "category", priority as "priority", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", assigned_agent_id as "assignedAgentId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE assigned_agent_id = #{assignedAgentId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", subject as "subject", category as "category", priority as "priority", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", assigned_agent_id as "assignedAgentId", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE priority = #{priority} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT id as "id", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", order_id as "orderId", subject as "subject", category as "category", priority as "priority", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", assigned_agent_id as "assignedAgentId", resolved_at as "resolvedAt", created_at as "createdAt" FROM hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
